chosen_action.title: Stop refreshing curator handoff packets while same-family windows are saturated

why_this_action.summary: The active marketing loop was still willing to pick curator handoff follow-through even after 48 curator contact attempts and 15 active curator review windows in the same day. That is fake progress against the audit's own overlap warning, so the highest-leverage move was to harden lane selection instead of letting the loop keep rewarding same-family churn.

result.post_repair_reason: Fresh reset targets already shipped, but same-family curator windows are already saturated; expand untouched target classes instead of refreshing another curator handoff packet.

expected_outcome: The loop stops spending active cycles on same-family curator handoff churn during saturated measurement windows and instead biases toward genuinely new target discovery until a cleaner execution lane exists.

measurement_window.success_metric: No new curator_handoff_packet selection while curator measurement windows remain saturated; next chosen lane is non-overlapping or newly executable.
measurement_window.kill_condition: If the selector still routes saturated curator states back into same-family packet churn, add a stronger fail-closed gate across all handoff-only lanes.
